description: Style NoteThese lotto Philadelphia shoes with sturdy soles, bold overlays and style highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek shoe. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt.Product DetailsBlunt toed white shoes with perforations on the forefoot and the backfootHas mesh inlays, central lace-ups with a padded tongue and innerThick foamy midsole, upraised at the heelTPU outsole with multiple grooves and lugs and a scooped heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
